revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fbicon%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} ==Description== {{fbicon|nation|variant|size=optional}} Produces a flag icon to the wikilinked national football team article. ;Parameters *''nation'' – Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter country code as used by [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA]] *''variant'' (optional) – Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. *''size'' (optional) – Can be used to change the flag icon size (use sparingly!) ==Examples== *{{fbicon|Argentina}} → {{fbicon|Argentina}} *{{fbicon|ENG}} → {{fbicon|ENG}} *{{fbicon|Italy|1861}} → {{fbicon|Italy|1861}} *{{fbicon|USA|1776}} → {{fbicon|USA|1776}} ==Parameters== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Nation", "description": "Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter country code as used by FIFA", "example": "Argentina", "type": "string", "required": true }, "variant": { "aliases": [ "2" ], "label": "Flag variant", "description": "Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in Category:Country data templates.", "example": "1861", "type": "string" }, "size": { "label": "Icon size", "description": "Can be used to change the flag icon size (use sparingly!)" } }, "description": "Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national football team article.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "variant", "size" ], "format": "inline" } ==See also== *[[Template:fb]] – for rendering a flag icon attached with the nation name, wikilinked national football team article. *[[Template:fb-rt]] – for rendering the flag on the right *[[:en:Template:Fb-big|Template:Fb-big]] – for rendering a larger flag, with the team name underneath the flag *[[:en:Template:Fbu|Template:Fbu]] – for under-''NN'' national teams (i.e. under-20, under-21, etc.) *[[:en:Template:Fbw|Template:Fbw]] – for women's national teams *[[:en:Template:Fbo|Template:Fbo]] – for national Olympic football teams *[[:Category:National association football teams]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Association football flag templates]] [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
